fault_hypothesis: The conversion from floating-point planned allocations to integers on line 68 uses simple truncation (`int()`), which discards the fractional parts. This causes the sum of the final allocations to be less than the total available CPUs when the division is not perfectly even.

constraints.intent: The sum of integer allocations must equal the total available CPUs.
The sum of planned floating-point allocations should be equal to the total.
The sum of truncated allocations should not be less than the truncated sum of planned allocations.
